steps.title: Locate the vertex
steps.content:
The function is
$$
g(x)=x^2+55
$$
Since $x^2\ge 0$ for all values of $x$, the smallest possible value of $x^2$ is $0$.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graphing the function shows the vertex at the minimum point, whose output is $55$. The answer is B.
